---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for SarnFund
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Problem
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is.

### Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Alternatives
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or API endpoint links (e.g. SEC Open Data API specifications) here.
